caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey peaked hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, brown suspenders, and a brown bowtie. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and speaking into a black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, there are shelves holding various items, including boxed apparel and framed photographs. Two logos are visible on the screen: one says "TALKBOY PODCAST" with a microphone icon, and another reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expression and head posture, while the camera angle and background remain static.
